markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on website progress, content performance, and schedule next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Website Launch Blocked:** The V1 website launch is blocked pending Tiago's final review. Kaitlin will meet Tiago in person next week to secure approval.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Blog Filter Fix:** The blog's messy filter list will be fixed by mapping the front-end to a pre-existing, condensed CMS field (`main block category`) instead of the current verbose tags.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Performance Stable:** Traffic is stable despite a Google bot-traffic filter and reduced publishing volume. The new "AI at scale" cluster is performing well.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Meeting Rescheduled:** Next week's sync is moved to Friday, 10 AM Pacific, to accommodate a board meeting and include a product demo.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

## Topics

### Website & Blog Filter

  - [**V1 Website Status:** Launch is blocked pending Tiago's final review.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Action:** Kaitlin will meet Tiago in person next week in SF to secure approval.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Context:** The current site is confusing to investors, making the V1 launch a high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Blog Filter Issue:** The current filter dropdown is unusable due to verbose tags (e.g., "AI for real estate").](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Solution:** Map the front-end filter to the CMS field `main block category`.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This field was created specifically for a condensed list, and all 800+ blogs are already categorized.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Future Improvement:** Implement multi-select filtering (e.g., "AI" + "Construction").](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [**Status:** The CMS already supports this with separate `use case` and `industry` fields, requiring only a front-end UI update.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

### Content & Performance

  - [**Performance Context:** Traffic is stable despite two factors:](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [Google's recent filtering of bot traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [A temporary decrease in publishing volume.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Positive Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**New Cluster:** "AI at scale" (targeting AI product managers) is attracting sessions and ranking well.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Updated articles in the "marketing documents" cluster are seeing increased clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Stable Performers:** AI agents for government, law, and healthcare continue to perform well.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Outlook:** Performance is expected to rise as recent content refreshes are indexed by Google.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)

### Admin & Logistics

  - [**Contract:** The new contract is in progress with Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Content Repository:** Kaitlin is creating a central folder for all content assets (quotes, stats, customer stories) to streamline sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Newsletter:** Outline and design templates are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**Link Cleanup:** Fixing broken internal links from unpublished articles is expected to finish by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Secure V1 website approval from Tiago next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Share the central content asset folder with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Send a screenshot of the `main block category` CMS field to Kaitlin.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**Mara:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Reschedule next week's sync to **Friday, 10 AM Pacific**.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
